title: Blade's Ingots
description: Revamped Pixel art for ore drops(iron, diamond, etc)
body:
## Blade's Revamped Ingots:

A simple Resource Pack that revamps the pixel art of ore drops.

## Overview:
### Revamped Textures:
Thus far,the following items have been revamped:
- Iron Ingot | Raw Iron | Iron Nugget
- Gold Ingot | Raw Gold | Iron Gold
- Copper Ingot | Raw Copper
- Lapis Lazuli
- Emerald
- Diamond 

- (More to come) 

### Revamped Ores

![Image of Revamped Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zCZnxVxC/images/5de549e23e103a61b163b486b38a8c15a8ee6658.png)

## FAQ:
### Question: Can I review this pack?
Answer: You have permission to review this pack.
### Question: Can I share this pack?
Answer: You may share links to the pack, and they must be directed to this page.
### Question: Will you update the pack?
Answer: Yes. If I end up revamping other existing ore drops/new ones, the pack will be updated accordingly.
### Question: How can I contact the author?
Answer: You can Message me on social media(e.g. Semiblade on X/twtter)
